# Release Notes

Setup guide
===========

Config
------

Everything you *need* to know: **bold**, ***both***, ~~gone~~, but
~~ spaced ~~ stays and _soft_ emphasis works with ``x`y`` spans,
snake_case_name, \*literal\*, and a  
hard break.

## Install `fast`

### Steps

1. Download the [**bold** installer](https://example.com/dl)
2. Visit https://example.com/dl directly
   - nested bullet one
   - nested `bullet` two
     1. deep ordered
3. Email <ops@example.com> or see <https://status.example.com>

- [ ] unchecked task
- [x] checked task and www.example.com too

> Quoted **wisdom** with a [link](https://q.example) inside.
>
> Second quote line.

---

| Flag | Effect | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--fast` | Skips checks | *risky* |
| `--safe` | Runs all checks | default |

```
plain code
  indented line
```

The end.
